verses.latin_vulgate: Domine, ne in furore tuo arguas me,  neque in ira tua corripias me :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יְֽהֹוָ֗ה אַל־בְּקֶצְפְּךָ֥ תוֹכִיחֵ֑נִי וּֽבַחֲמָתְךָ֥ תְיַסְּרֵֽנִי׃
verses.douay_rheims: Rebuke me not, O Lord, in thy indignation; nor chastise me in thy wrath.
verses.finnish_biblia: Davidin Psalmi muistoksi. (H38:2) Herra, älä rankaise minua vihassas, ja älä kurita minua hirmuisuudessas!
verses.king_james: O Lord, rebuke me not in thy wrath: neither chasten me in thy hot displeasure.

verses.latin_vulgate: quoniam sagittæ tuæ infixæ sunt mihi,  et confirmasti super me manum tuam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּֽי־חִ֭צֶּיךָ נִ֣חֲתוּ בִ֑י וַתִּנְחַ֖ת עָלַ֣י יָדֶֽךָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: For thy arrows are fastened in me: and thy hand hath been strong upon me.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä sinun nuoles ovat minuun kiinnitetyt, ja sinun kätes painaa minua.
verses.king_james: For thine arrows stick fast in me, and thy hand presseth me sore.

verses.latin_vulgate: Non est sanitas in carne mea, a facie iræ tuæ ;  non est pax ossibus meis, a facie peccatorum meorum :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֵין־מְתֹ֣ם בִּ֭בְשָׂרִי מִפְּנֵ֣י זַעְמֶ֑ךָ אֵין־שָׁל֥וֹם בַּ֝עֲצָמַ֗י מִפְּנֵ֥י חַטָּאתִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: There is no health in my flesh, because of thy wrath: there is no peace for my bones, because of my sins.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ei ole terveys minun ruumiissani, sinun uhkauksestas: ja ei ole rauhaa minun luissani, minun synteini tähden.
verses.king_james: There is no soundness in my flesh because of thine anger; neither is there any rest in my bones because of my sin.

verses.latin_vulgate: quoniam iniquitates meæ supergressæ sunt caput meum,  et sicut onus grave gravatæ sunt super me.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֣י עֲ֭וֺנֹתַי עָבְר֣וּ רֹאשִׁ֑י כְּמַשָּׂ֥א כָ֝בֵ֗ד יִכְבְּד֥וּ מִמֶּֽנִּי׃
verses.douay_rheims: For my iniquities are gone over my head: and as a heavy burden are become heavy upon me.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä minun syntini käyvät pääni ylitse; niinkuin raskas kuorma ovat he ylen raskaaksi tulleet.
verses.king_james: For mine iniquities are gone over mine head: as an heavy burden they are too heavy for me.

verses.latin_vulgate: Putruerunt et corruptæ sunt cicatrices meæ,  a facie insipientiæ meæ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הִבְאִ֣ישׁוּ נָ֭מַקּוּ חַבּוּרֹתָ֑י מִ֝פְּנֵ֗י אִוַּלְתִּֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: My sores are putrefied and corrupted, because of my foolishness.
verses.finnish_biblia: Minun haavani haisevat ja mätänevät minun hulluuteni tähden.
verses.king_james: My wounds stink and are corrupt because of my foolishness.

verses.latin_vulgate: Miser factus sum et curvatus sum usque in finem ;  tota die contristatus ingrediebar.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: נַעֲוֵ֣יתִי שַׁחֹ֣תִי עַד־מְאֹ֑ד כׇּל־הַ֝יּ֗וֹם קֹדֵ֥ר הִלָּֽכְתִּי׃
verses.douay_rheims: I am become miserable, and am bowed down even to the end: I walked sorrowful all the day long.
verses.finnish_biblia: Minä käyn kymärässä ja kumarruksissa: yli päivää minä käyn murheissani.
verses.king_james: I am troubled; I am bowed down greatly; I go mourning all the day long.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quoniam lumbi mei impleti sunt illusionibus,  et non est sanitas in carne mea.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּֽי־כְ֭סָלַי מָלְא֣וּ נִקְלֶ֑ה וְאֵ֥ין מְ֝תֹ֗ם בִּבְשָׂרִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: For my loins are filled with illusions; and there is no health in my flesh.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä minun kupeeni peräti kuivettuvat, ja ei ole mitään tervettä minun ruumiissani.
verses.king_james: For my loins are filled with a loathsome disease: and there is no soundness in my flesh.

verses.latin_vulgate: Afflictus sum, et humiliatus sum nimis ;  rugiebam a gemitu cordis mei.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: נְפוּג֣וֹתִי וְנִדְכֵּ֣יתִי עַד־מְאֹ֑ד שָׁ֝אַ֗גְתִּי מִֽנַּהֲמַ֥ת לִבִּֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: I am afflicted and humbled exceedingly: I roared with the groaning of my heart.
verses.finnish_biblia: Minä olen ylen paljon runneltu ja lyöty rikki: minä myrisen minun sydämeni kivusta.
verses.king_james: I am feeble and sore broken: I have roared by reason of the disquietness of my heart.

verses.latin_vulgate: Domine, ante te omne desiderium meum,  et gemitus meus a te non est absconditus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֲֽדֹנָ֗י נֶגְדְּךָ֥ כׇל־תַּאֲוָתִ֑י וְ֝אַנְחָתִ֗י מִמְּךָ֥ לֹֽא־נִסְתָּֽרָה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Lord, all my desire is before thee, and my groaning is not hidden from thee.
verses.finnish_biblia: Herra, sinun edessäs on kaikki minun haluni, ja minun huokaukseni ei ole sinulta salattu.
verses.king_james: Lord, all my desire is before thee; and my groaning is not hid from thee.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cor meum conturbatum est ;  dereliquit me virtus mea, et lumen oculorum meorum,  et ipsum non est mecum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לִבִּ֣י סְ֭חַרְחַר עֲזָבַ֣נִי כֹחִ֑י וְֽאוֹר־עֵינַ֥י גַּם־הֵ֝֗ם אֵ֣ין אִתִּֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: My heart is troubled, my strength hath left me, and the light of my eyes itself is not with me.
verses.finnish_biblia: Minun sydämeni värisee, minun voimani on minusta luopunut, ja minun silmäini valkeus ei ole minun tykönäni.
verses.king_james: My heart panteth, my strength faileth me: as for the light of mine eyes, it also is gone from me.

verses.latin_vulgate: Amici mei et proximi mei adversum me appropinquaverunt, et steterunt ;  et qui juxta me erant, de longe steterunt :  et vim faciebant qui quærebant animam meam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֹֽהֲבַ֨י ׀ וְרֵעַ֗י מִנֶּ֣גֶד נִגְעִ֣י יַעֲמֹ֑דוּ וּ֝קְרוֹבַ֗י מֵרָחֹ֥ק עָמָֽדוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: My friends and my neighbours have drawn near, and stood against me. And they that were near me stood afar off:
verses.finnish_biblia: Minun ystäväni ja lähimmäiseni ovat kohdastansa minua vastaan, ja minun omaiseni seisovat kaukana.
verses.king_james: My lovers and my friends stand aloof from my sore; and my kinsmen stand afar off.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et qui inquirebant mala mihi, locuti sunt vanitates,  et dolos tota die meditabantur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְנַקְשׁ֤וּ ׀ מְבַקְשֵׁ֬י נַפְשִׁ֗י וְדֹרְשֵׁ֣י רָ֭עָתִי דִּבְּר֣וּ הַוּ֑וֹת וּ֝מִרְמ֗וֹת כׇּל־הַיּ֥וֹם יֶהְגּֽוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And they that sought my soul used violence. And they that sought evils to me spoke vain things, and studied deceits all the day long.
verses.finnish_biblia: Jotka minun sieluani etsivät, ne virittelevät paulat minun eteeni, ja jotka minulle pahaa suovat, ne puhuvat sulaa pahuutta, ja petosta joka päivä ajattelevat.
verses.king_james: They also that seek after my life lay snares for me: and they that seek my hurt speak mischievous things, and imagine deceits all the day long.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ego autem, tamquam surdus, non audiebam ;  et sicut mutus non aperiens os suum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַאֲנִ֣י כְ֭חֵרֵשׁ לֹ֣א אֶשְׁמָ֑ע וּ֝כְאִלֵּ֗ם לֹ֣א יִפְתַּח־פִּֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: But I, as a deaf man, heard not: and as a dumb man not opening his mouth.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta minun täytyy olla niinkuin kuuron, ja ei mitään kuuleman, ja niinkuin mykän, joka ei avaja suutansa,
verses.king_james: But I, as a deaf man, heard not; and I was as a dumb man that openeth not his mouth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et factus sum sicut homo non audiens,  et non habens in ore suo redargutiones.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וָאֱהִ֗י כְּ֭אִישׁ אֲשֶׁ֣ר לֹֽא־שֹׁמֵ֑עַ וְאֵ֥ין בְּ֝פִ֗יו תּוֹכָחֽוֹת׃
verses.douay_rheims: And I became as a man that heareth not: and that hath no reproofs in his mouth.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja minun täytyy olla niinkuin se, joka ei mitään kuule, ja jonka suussa ei ole vastausta.
verses.king_james: Thus I was as a man that heareth not, and in whose mouth are no reproofs.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quoniam in te, Domine, speravi ;  tu exaudies me, Domine Deus meus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּֽי־לְךָ֣ יְהֹוָ֣ה הוֹחָ֑לְתִּי אַתָּ֥ה תַ֝עֲנֶ֗ה אֲדֹנָ֥י אֱלֹהָֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: For in thee, O Lord, have I hoped: thou wilt hear me, O Lord my God.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta minä odotan sinua, Herra; sinä, Herra, minun Jumalani, kuultelet minua.
verses.king_james: For in thee, O Lord, do I hope: thou wilt hear, O Lord my God.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quia dixi : Nequando supergaudeant mihi inimici mei ;  et dum commoventur pedes mei, super me magna locuti sunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּֽי־אָ֭מַרְתִּי פֶּן־יִשְׂמְחוּ־לִ֑י בְּמ֥וֹט רַ֝גְלִ֗י עָלַ֥י הִגְדִּֽילוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: For I said: Lest at any time my enemies rejoice over me: and whilst my feet are moved, they speak great things against me.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä minä ajattelen, ettei heidän suinkaan pidä minusta iloitseman: jos minun jalkani kompastuis, niin he kerskaisivat sangen paljon minusta.
verses.king_james: For I said, Hear me, lest otherwise they should rejoice over me: when my foot slippeth, they magnify themselves against me.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quoniam ego in flagella paratus sum,  et dolor meus in conspectu meo semper.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּֽי־אֲ֭נִי לְצֶ֣לַע נָכ֑וֹן וּמַכְאוֹבִ֖י נֶגְדִּ֣י תָמִֽיד׃
verses.douay_rheims: For I am ready for scourges: and my sorrow is continually before me.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä minä olen tehty kärsimään, ja minun kipuni on alati minun edessäni.
verses.king_james: For I am ready to halt, and my sorrow is continually before me.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quoniam iniquitatem meam annuntiabo,  et cogitabo pro peccato meo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּֽי־עֲוֺנִ֥י אַגִּ֑יד אֶ֝דְאַ֗ג מֵ֖חַטָּאתִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: For I will declare my iniquity: and I will think for my sin.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä minä julistan pahan tekoni, ja murehdin syntini tähden.
verses.king_james: For I will declare mine iniquity; I will be sorry for my sin.

verses.latin_vulgate: Inimici autem mei vivunt, et confirmati sunt super me :  et multiplicati sunt qui oderunt me inique.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְֽ֭אֹיְבַי חַיִּ֣ים עָצֵ֑מוּ וְרַבּ֖וּ שֹׂנְאַ֣י שָֽׁקֶר׃
verses.douay_rheims: But my enemies live, and are stronger than I: and they that hate me wrongfully are multiplied.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta minun viholliseni elävät ja ovat väkevät: ne ovat suuret, jotka minua syyttömästi vihaavat.
verses.king_james: But mine enemies are lively, and they are strong: and they that hate me wrongfully are multiplied.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui retribuunt mala pro bonis detrahebant mihi,  quoniam sequebar bonitatem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמְשַׁלְּמֵ֣י רָ֭עָה תַּ֣חַת טוֹבָ֑ה יִ֝שְׂטְנ֗וּנִי תַּ֣חַת (רדופי) [רׇֽדְפִי־]טֽוֹב׃
verses.douay_rheims: They that render evil for good, have detracted me, because I followed goodness.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja ne, jotka minulle maksavat pahalla hyvän, asettavat heitänsä minua vastaan, että minä hyvää noudatan.
verses.king_james: They also that render evil for good are mine adversaries; because I follow the thing that good is.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ne derelinquas me, Domine Deus meus ;  ne discesseris a me.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַל־תַּעַזְבֵ֥נִי יְהֹוָ֑ה אֱ֝לֹהַ֗י אַל־תִּרְחַ֥ק מִמֶּֽנִּי׃
verses.douay_rheims: For sake me not, O Lord my God: do not thou depart from me.
verses.finnish_biblia: Älä hylkää minua, Herra: minun Jumalani, älä ole kaukana minusta!
verses.king_james: Forsake me not, O Lord: O my God, be not far from me.

verses.latin_vulgate: Intende in adjutorium meum,  Domine Deus salutis meæ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: ח֥וּשָׁה לְעֶזְרָתִ֑י אֲ֝דֹנָ֗י תְּשׁוּעָתִֽי׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: Attend unto my help, O Lord, the God of my salvation.
verses.finnish_biblia: Riennä minua auttamaan, Herra, minun autuuteni!
verses.king_james: Make haste to help me, O Lord my salvation.
